...I happen to agree. Why do we have to wait?
According to Baracca, this is Holy See tradition.
But I AM a shipgirl. Forget the tradition – let's just go to the church already.
Are you certain, Your Grace?
Who knows what the enemy might be scheming while we waste our time? We have to act fast.
Plus, that dream of mine just now gave me a brilliant idea that might get us the upper hand...
Sorry... I don't understand what you're talking about whatsoever.
Forget it! What matters is that we take action now instead of dawdling! Let's go!

Gate III.say: When I return from the recorded memory beyond the door, the distant silhouette I saw feels like it becomes just a little clearer.
(Project H... And something about an artificial mind? Must be referring to an AI.)
As thoughts float through my head like clouds, a new door reveals itself ahead on the path.
I reach out to touch it, and everything changes abruptly.
A fleet proceeds at high speed across a silvery-white sea.
Hierophant, we will arrive at the distress signal's point of origin in three minutes.
Currently, no signs of life have been detected.
...Yes, I know. The interference is so strong that my search results aren't reliable.
KABOOOM!
Warning: Mimic beasts detected in distress signal's area. Looks like they're lying in ambush.
Warning: Mimic beast interference across all ship systems detected. That confirms it – this is a trap.
Employing experimental Rod of Hierophant.
Hierophant, the interference is getting weaker.
Yes, I detected that the source of it disappeared at the same time.
Experimental Rod of Hierophant usage complete. Data collection complete. Tunguska meteorite sample status is normal.
Employing experimental Rod of Hierophant.
Disintegration characteristics: Pure white. Observation successful.
Strike effect detected. Airborne and waterborne mimic entity vector zones are collapsing.
Experimental Rod of Hierophant usage complete. Data collection complete. Tunguska meteorite sample status is normal.
Hierophant, coordinates for the next area of operation have arrived. Revising course.

The Apostle's Afternoon.say: A strange sense of unease gripping her, Marco Polo headed straight to the destination with her aides.
At first, that is. Then the free and lively mood of Florence lured her into taking a pleasant stroll through the streets.
They enjoyed a relaxing field trip detour before eventually arriving at the church.
There, Marco Polo laid eyes on the murals Raffaello had painted, taking away the last dregs of unease in her mind.
Now, she lay sideways on a lounge chair in a garden, thinking about another important matter.
Look, Raffaello. How do I look holding this sword?
A ceremonial sword in hand, Marco Polo struck a graceful pose while Raffaello painstakingly committed her majesty to canvas paper.
Looking good, Your Grace! You look perfect with a sword, fighting back evil, and seizing victory!
Magnificent! Then I shall name this sword, "Blade of the Preeminent"!
Make it so the grip is furnished with gold and inlaid with sapphires, and make the blade of meteoric steel blessed with good fortune...
Be sure to add angel wings, the Eye of Truth, and an inscription that says, "Marco Polo, the Chosen One"!
Let me be clear – this sword I'm holding is only a visual reference. What I just described is how you should paint it!
Yeah, I got it! I'm a pro, remember?
Heheh... Of course. I trust your expertise.
But I must ask... You've started drawing, so why is it that your art doesn't grant me the things and powers you depict me with?
Your guess is as good as mine...
Maybe it's not complete enough, or something? It's only at the initial sketch stage, so yeah.
Ah, that would make sense. Continue, then!
Baracca, bring me my staff!
A while later, Marco Polo held her staff high and proud.
I will call this "the Brilliant One's Staff"!
The principal material should be narwhal horns, decorated with gold. Oh, and inscribe it with "Marco Polo, the Chosen One"!
You got it! Anything else?
Add a big ruby at its very end. Be sure to also include a decoration consisting of angel wings and the Eye of Truth!
Sure thing. Do you want anything else?
That will be all for now. Although, this pose isn't quite doing it for me. Come up with a few variations, would you? I'll pick the one I like most.
Oh. Sure.
Let's give the orb a try next.
Baracca, the globus cruciger! Fetch it for me!
Sometime later, Marco Polo raised an orb with a cross haughtily toward the heavens.
Okay, what'll it be this time? I need deets!
Ahem... I name this orb and cross, "the Orb of the Grandest One"!
Roger-dodger. Decorated with gold, furnished with angel wings and the Eye of Truth, and inscribed with the words, "Marco Polo, the Chosen One" – right?
What gemstone do you want?
A large topaz at the very top, surrounded by small diamonds and agates. I want to see some amber, too!
Noted. How many different poses do you want?
One will do. What do you think of this one?
Are you, uhh... about to throw the orb like a shot put ball?
"First shalt thou take out the Holy Pin. Then, shalt thou count to three. No more. No less."
"Three shalt be the number thou shalt count. Four shalt thou not count, nor either count thou two, excepting that thou then proceed to three. Five is right out."
"Once the number three, being the third number, be reached, then, lobbest thou thy Holy Hand Grenade of Antioch towards thy foe."
Uh... What?
Oh, you don't get it? Must be ahead of this world's time, I suppose...
Any pose will do then. Present whichever you like. The more variants, the better!
Oookay...
*sigh*...
Marco Polo had Raffaello paint her in all kinds of ways, and yet none of them gave her any sort of power.
While that pursuit yielded no fruit, it was an entertaining and relaxing afternoon for her.
Come the evening, she received news from Giosuè Carducci, who had gone off to do something else.
She told her that the church's facilities were ready for inspection.

Destroyer of Darkness.say: After a lavish dinner, Marco Polo and her followers arrived at the entrance to the newly-built church.
Like their visit to the Armory of God, they went through a narrow underground tunnel and wound up inside another vast space.
Hm? Aren't these devices different from the ones we saw in the last ruin?
They don't look antique... Or rather, they don't look like they've always been here.
That's because they haven't. The Church designed this equipment over many years based on records left in the Ruins of God.
What does that mean? That this place is easier to control not because the connection to God is strong, but because of the heavy presence of manmade machines?
You can think of it like that.
This facility is formally known as a Source of God's Light. It's located beneath the church because its function complements the church.
Its purpose is to gather and condense the power of belief, thus making it able to be stored.
Stored? What is used for?
It's there if we ever need it.
Also, while the Source may look rather large, it's in fact only a node – one of many.
Around 100 like it exist across the Sardegnia League, and most of them are within the borders of the Sardegna Ecclesia. The remaining are located under churches belonging to members of the League.
In other words, there's a giant network of these spanning the entirety of the League?
Yes, and it's called the Lattice of God's Light. This Source is the final node in the network.
Once this inspection is done, it will connect to all other notes, completing the network.
What happens then? After the network is complete.
I suspect you will gain unrivaled power within the area covered by the Lattice of God's Light, Your Grace.
Magnificent! Exclusive rights to the power of belief – what an ingenious idea!
Hang on, wait...
This Lattice sounds like the microlayer transference system... and the nodes are like conceptual anchors... A network covering a vast area, thus granting you unparalleled power...
I think I know what this is...
Marco Polo trembled, as though she had recalled something terrible.
(This is bad. Based on my experience, nothing good will come of this!)
For seconds, she stared at the "friend" who appeared in her mind, then immediately issued an order.
Baracca, Carducci, and Raffaello – postpone the plan to activate the Lattice indefinitely! We are going to inspect each and every node once more!
Huh?! Indefinitely? Why? Did you find something wrong?
My intuition sure did! This place is especially suspect, as it's the final piece of it all!
Baracca, conduct a top-to-bottom inspection!
An hour later, Baracca returned with bad news and a gloomy look on her face.
It's as you suspect, Your Grace. I found signs of meddling. Certain crucial parts have been very obviously intentionally destroyed.
What?! But we performed an exhaustive inspection just yesterday!
That means the saboteurs knew our plans and only caused damage after that final check...
Looks like they didn't expect Her Grace to look twice at it. Thank goodness we identified the damage before it was too late.
How severe was it?
Quite severe. It's been rendered inoperable, and it'll take at least two weeks to repair.
I see... What would've happened, had I not halted the activation due to my suspicion?
Activating the Lattice on its own wouldn't have caused any problems, but since this Source is a tier one node, the Lattice would've been certainly incomplete.
In essence, its operating efficiency would have dropped and the defensive power of the Republic of Florence would have significantly fallen.
So worse performance, but still functional, then.
(Hmph. Saboteurs? More like amateurs.)
(Instead of just reducing the Lattice working efficiency, they should've hidden a backdoor into the Lattice...)
(Then they should've waited until the moment I called upon the power, thus maximizing the damage inflicted...)
(If Clemenceau were here, that's exactly what she would've done!)
The memories of the past shook her heart like a tree in a gale. She shook her head and collected herself.
(I will not make the same mistake twice!)
(The Church, God, these ancient artifacts... They all reek of Siren involvement...)
(But the last thing I will do is get stabbed in the back again! At the very least, I want to face that dagger head-on...)
(No, what am I saying? I don't want to get stabbed in the first place!)
(I will beat those cowardly conspirators to the punch, expose them for the world to see, and crush them beneath my heels!)
Ahem! I've made up my mind! We will get to the bottom of this. Whoever did this, I WILL find them if it's the last thing I do!
Since the sabotage happened yesterday, the perpetrator must still be hiding somewhere in Florence.
I'll inform all relevant parties and start an investigation.
And I will contact the government of Florence and negotiate for their full cooperation.
Magnificent! Oh, and tell Alfredo and da Vinci to give us a hand!
One has many connections, the other is good at investigating. Furthermore, they have yet to pay me for using my private train!

Second Step Into Night.say: Kingdom of Naples - Capital
A group of shipgirls carried out their final combat simulations at a massive sand table.
Andrea, our spies in the Sardegna Ecclesia and Republic of Florence have reported that nothing has changed.
They've brought their Apostle, their key to further power... but for some reason, they refuse to make the next move.
As for the Apostle herself, she has left for Florence for a little museum field trip. Hmph, at least someone is having fun.
Florence... Speaking of Florence, Colleoni did a wonderful job of destroying their Source of God's Light there.
Added to the thirty percent of subordinate nodes that we've seized in four countries, we should be able to minimize the threat posed by the Lattice of God's Light.
Everyone, there's been movement in Milan.
We have reports that they started gathering troops one hour ago under the pretense of "an emergency military exercise." Cavour has personally headed to the border.
Wasn't the Dukedom abstaining from this war? What are they planning? Surely they haven't changed their mind.
Do you think they're just doing their job as allies? It's entirely possible that they want to warn the Sardegna Ecclesia.
That would be bad.
No matter. We'll mobilize our army per the plan soon. It was never our intent to keep this a secret.
Garibaldi, let's deal with Milan as planned. Can you lead the Genoan fleet to monitor them for me?
If they remain neutral as promised even after we've raised the Banner of Eternal Night, then you may leave and join the attack on Florence.
Otherwise, destroy them.
Right. I've already made preparations in that regard.
Trento, you and Bolzano will lead the Venetian fleet. Split into two teams and stand by.
I will lead the Kingdom of the Two Sicilies on a frontal attack. Once the Ecclesia's army is focused on the southern line, attack from the north and east simultaneously.
We'll seize as many nodes as we can in the short time we have and deploy the Banner of Eternal Night on the Sources of God's Light.
The Lattice may be weakened, but we mustn't underestimate God Himself.
Only by neutralizing His power with META corrosion can we truly feel at ease.
Once the Lattice of God's Light is converted into the Domain of Eternal Night, it will grant us great power.
All forces must stick strictly to the plan. Do not ransack facilities without a pressing reason.
We can handle that. But will you be okay? The Ecclesia's capital is as well-fortified as they come.
The Lattice can still work in a reduced capacity on its own, and we don't know what weapons might be in those Armories of God...
We'll just have to overcome it with raw force. The instant the Banner is deployed, our chance of victory skyrockets.
If all else fails... then do not forget that we have our own secret weapons.
We have less than half a day left. Everyone, prepare yourselves.
We will celebrate triumph in Rome!
We will celebrate triumph in Rome!

Gate IV.say: When I return from the recorded memory beyond the door, the distant silhouette seems a little closer.
(Project M, Madam M. The Magician.)
(That figure and that voice... She spoke more robotically, but that was definitely her.)
(Her number is I, but she seems to have been born after Hierophant, which is V...)
(Did Dr. Aoste really build the Arbiters based on pure whim?)
(What kind of orders to the Antiochus system led to the Sirens of today?)
"The Magister Plan." The crux of Aoste's work. A project that involved me, and perhaps even Dr. Anzeel, along with old friends who I can no longer remember.
Observer called it a grand plan to create change for the future, and provided me with extensive records of experiments she had been involved in.
Queen Elizabeth META simply described it as, "survival of the fittest."
And, as cryptically as ever, Helena META had only told me to trust in Dr. Anzeel's decision. Nothing else.
...It's all too complex.
While I rack my brain over it, another door appears on the path forward.
I reach out to touch it, and everything changes abruptly.
The sea burns beneath dark clouds.
Wichita, the outer Mirror Sea has been pierced.
It's only a matter of time before this place falls. We can't protect it.
I can't believe they dispatched Devil and Hierophant just for one little support outpost...
They must have figured out our plan! The main force is in danger!
There's no point staying here... Fighting 'em head-on would be reckless. Let's retreat.
I hate to outright abandon this base... Here I thought the Sirens would never think of checking a world that's been wiped clean.
That's enough resistance. Why not surrender now?
You've got a big mouth, kid! Who's really talking, though? Is it your puppeteer, Hierophant?
Hah! Well, I gave you the option to surrender. Now that you've refused–
BOOM BOOM BOOM!
A series of thunderous booms erupted in the skies above.
Space itself seemed to collapse for an instant, heralding the appearance of one girl.
Where... am I?
Essex?!
No, that can't be. Our Essex left us so long ago...
Are you a remnant of this test site, or did you wander in from another one somehow?!
Wichita, I think something much more problematic came in alongside her!
In the distance, a great storm brewed.
Beneath the storm, a fluid emitting an uncanny blue light coated the sea.
Countless things seemed to stagger, squirm, and crowd upon it.
Mimic beasts?!
Tch... Change of plans. I have to fight those mimic beasts.
Hm? Does the X threaten her more than we do? Let's take this opportunity to retreat!
Should we take her with us?
Hmm... Yeah. She might be useful in a fight.
If she's willing to come, then let's take her!
Hmph. You win some, you lose some.
Mimic beasts coming straight for us... I'd call that a loss.
Hierophant, same plan as usual. I'll amplify the Rod of Hierophant for you.
Neutralize it as soon as possible and stop the corrosion!
The light flows ceaselessly.
I'm still on the inside of the door, but I realize that the inside and outside are no different now.
Chanting echoes throughout the pure-white world and pierces my ears.
For some reason, the strange, grating chorus sounds oddly soft now.
AOBZ, AOL OPLYVWOHUA BZLK PAZ ZJLWALY
"Thus, the Hierophant used its scepter."
AOL APKL ZBIZPKLK
"The tide subsided..."
HUK KVDU PA ZBUR PUAV AOL KLWAOZ
"...And down it sunk into the depths."

Declaration of War.say: In pursuit of the enemy saboteur, Marco Polo and the gang searched for clues near the city square.
Here it is! Pay attention, everyone! My intel must be right!
My sources pointed to this spot, as well.
But I don't see anything of note here...
The scent cuts off here, too. Strange... My Meow-Meow Sniffer Dog wouldn't make such an elementary mistake.
Could they just be really good at hiding?
Hiding alone won't let you escape my doggy, not by a long shot.
Unless they used some kind of special method to erase any trace of their presence...
Question. The scent stops right as you get to this square, right? Not in front of a particular building?
You've got that right, Your Grace!
So you would say that it cut off abruptly.
Yeah, yeah!
Abruptly cut off. Abruptly...
Whoa, whoa, whoa!
That's suspicious! Come on, come with me!
Marco Polo walked back the way they had come, past the site where the scent had suddenly cut off.
Check again for me, da Vinci. Is the scent still here?
When I checked just now, I'm pretty sure... Huh?!
What?! It's gone? The scent is gone from this spot, too?! Is my invention really malfunctioning? It can't be...
Hmm, I think I've judged this correctly. This is an area of distorted reality.
We're trapped in an illusion.
An illusion...
Look around you. Do you sense anything unusual?
I don't know how I'd be able to tell...
I'm sorry... I don't know, either.
That's fine. I only feel it a little bit, myself. These tricks aren't very easy to crack.
Hmm... Now that you mention it, something does feel a little off.
Oh? Tell me more.
Like, that building over there looks too new, and the way the light hits that other one is unnatural.
Hmm... The buildings in the distance don't really fit the rest of this street, either.
Raffaello pointed in various different directions throughout her explanation.
Actually, it's really easy to tell. Have you girls not noticed?
Naturally, everyone else was confused.
Ahem... If you can see the incongruities, then that makes this easier.
After a moment of silence, Marco Polo suddenly seemed confident.
Trying to trap an Apostle? And a brilliant one, at that? Our enemies underestimate me.
I have nine ways to break this illusion!
Can you point out all of the incongruities around us, Raffaello?
Umm... Well, there are a whole lot. Like there, over there, and way over there... Oh, and there.
You can't just point. Mark every single one of them for me.
Might I suggest putting those artistic skills to good use? Can you draw the correct scenery, Raffaello?
Of course! I know every one of Florence's streets like the back of my hand. I could draw them with my eyes closed!
Then do just that, please. We'll compare your rendition to the surrounding scenery. I'm confident that I can accomplish such precise work.
So basically, I draw pictures, and you spot the differences?
Okay! Sounds like we've got a dream team in the making!
In the sunlight, Carducci stretched out her arm. The sun and breeze gathered in her palm.
Next to her, Raffaello swiftly yet diligently sketched her renditions of the city.
The wind blew each sketch into Carducci's waiting hand, and one by one, they pieced together a detailed picture of the district.
Phew... My comparisons are going well.
I wouldn't have noticed so many if not for Raffaello's photographic memory.
Is this real magic?!
Your Grace, this is but one miracle wrought by the power of my faith.
It's brain power!
Normally, I just use it to correct imprecise language in paperwork...
Brain! Power!
Yes, yes, brain power. Let's call it that.
Now get to work. Don't you want to break this illusion?
Ugh, not getting paid just wrecks my motivation. And I don't even get to slack off...
What did you just say?
Sorry, sorry, I'll draw now! If I'm only good at one thing, it's drawing!
After a while, Raffaello had finished her work. The final page floated on the wind to Carducci.
With a flash of light, a detailed restoration of the city was complete.
All done!
My comparison is complete, too. I marked every single difference down.
Your Grace, what do we do next?
Heheh. Now that I have the correct perception at hand, the rest is easy.
Now, behold!
Marco Polo put her hands together and mentally recited a certain name.
The veil of illusion had been shattered, and the gang was back in reality.
Not far away, they saw an unexpected figure.
You escaped that so quickly. Maybe I underestimated you.
Meow-Meow Sniffer Dog is reacting! It's her!
Bartolomeo Colleoni. Why are you here?!
Are you already doing it...?!
Why ask questions you already know the answer to?
On behalf of Andrea Doria, I come with a joint declaration from Naples, Sicily, Venice, Genoa, and Milan, for Her Grace.
This is an era of freedom. Our league will no longer be bound by the shackles of God.
We must be the ones to pen the end of this long tale.
As such, Your Grace... Consider us at war.
After that declaration, Bartolomeo Colleoni left an official written document and disappeared into a sudden puff of smoke.
Argh, she got away... Let's chase her!
There's no point in trying. Besides, the situation is clear.
There are more pressing matters now.
Hold it! Didn't the Republic of Venice send her to celebrate me becoming the Apostle?
Why in the world would she sabotage me now...?
Andrea's faction has finally sprung into action.
What is "Andrea's faction"? The Kingdom of the Two Sicilies is allied with us, isn't it? Does springing into action refer to that declaration?
They sent people here just to declare war on me? For what purpose?
Shackles, stories... I don't get any of it!
Huh? You're the Apostle, aren't you? Carducci, did you not explain all of this to her?
Her Grace has not been in power for long, so I had her focus on internal affairs to start. The plan was to teach her about such external matters bit by bit...
As for her mentions of shackles and stories, those are simply Andrea Doria's inflammatory propaganda.
She's always believed that our God is harmful to the world. That we are shackled and bound to His whims.
Forced to follow His script, fated to face extinction after a caged and fruitless life.
For a long time now, she's worked in secret to win over a base of allies in order to overthrow Sardegnian hegemony over the league and separate faith and secularity once and for all.
Of the seven powers of the Sardegnia League, the Republic of Florence and Dukedom of Milan have been steadfast allies of the Sardegna Ecclesia...
But the Kingdom of the Two Sicilies, the Republic of Venice, and the Genoan Republic oppose us.
In recent years, Andrea's faction has gradually gained the upper hand on us.
However, upon the Holy See's analysis of God's revelation, we learned that a shipgirl Apostle was the key to harnessing divine power. With that, the situation has been clearly reversed.
We'd expected her to take countermeasures, but not this soon.
WHY DID YOU NOT MENTION THAT?!
I'm sorry, Your Grace... We misjudged the situation.
Well, if what she says is to be believed, then it doesn't sound like Milan is such a steadfast ally after all.
We can't say for certain right now. It may be one of Andrea's lies.
At any rate, there's no doubt that Florence remains an ally of yours.
That Andrea girl sounds awfully cunning. She knew just the right time to strike... Fascinating.
Ahem. Anyway, dividing faith and secularity must entail dethroning me as Apostle, yes?
I won't let her get away with that! Why, I'll crush her with my own two hands!
Then what do we do?
We should return home and call a meeting of the College of Cardinals at once.
This is an emergency, and you want to hold meetings?!
I'm in charge here. I call the shots!
We are going back to Rome, and everyone is going to obey my orders!
I'll figure out the strategy as we go. For now... Let's set sail at once!

Ambush on the Arno River.say: For the sake of safety and speed, Marco Polo's group did not choose to return directly by train.
Instead, they chose Carducci's proposal – crossing a few rivers to make straight for Rome.
As a result, the section of the Arno River flowing through the Republic of Florence would become the most dangerous part of the return route.
They rushed along the water's surface, heading for the Sardegna Ecclesia's territory at full speed.
The riverside sent a message saying everything looks normal. We might be able to go back safely.
I doubt it. There is no way Andrea would foolishly not anticipate that someone might take this route.
She wants to capture the Apostle – me! If she didn't, she wouldn't have made Bartolomeo go through the effort of erecting an illusion to delay us!
All of you, keep your eyes and ears open!
KABOOOM!
Here they come... That bunch is nothing if not bold.
What did you expect? They appeared before us to formally declare war, for goodness' sake!
Ahem... If it's the Apostle you seek, then I am right here! Show yourselves and state your names!
From within the dark mist, two shadowy figures slowly came into view.
You anticipated an ambush here, I see. Perhaps you're not as incompetent as the rumors say.
I am Bolzano, a knight of the Sardegnia League. It's a shame we must meet under these conditions, Your Grace.
(METAs? Again? If we assume that Andrea Doria is META as well, then...)
(Perhaps their kind are commonplace in this world?)
(Even Trento has turned... How strange.)
Trento, if a fight is inevitable, can't we at least have some pleasantries first? Why won't you say anything?
...You are Marco Polo, the Apostle, yes?
What is it, Trento? Is something wrong with her?
For some reason, this scenario is giving me an intense sense of deja vu. It's like I've experienced it in a dream...
Is that so? Perhaps in that dream, you and I accomplished something incredible together – is that correct?
...I can't remember.
That's it, then. We've spoken long enough.
Now that we've introduced ourselves, it's time you said your prayers. We won't go easy on you.
Took the words right out of my mouth!
No sooner than I gained the position I desired was I forced into days of exhausting work, then when I finally got to go outside for a breather, I was attacked...
My anger has reached critical mass, and you will suffer all of it!
Come, girls! After me!
As soon as she said those words, Marco Polo commenced the attack, to the surprise of everyone around her.
You're making the first move? How bold of you!
Intercept them!
KABOOOM!
Marco Polo's position after several clashes was far from disadvantageous. If anything, her momentum was growing and growing, and the advantage was hers.
Is that all you have?
You're weaker than I anticipated, and your aim is sloppy.
You're clearly lacking in combat experience as well. Ohohohoho!
I'm impressed, Apostle. Frankly, I underestimated you.
It's time to get serious.
As Trento said that, she took out an intricate, black cube.
(It's black... An Origin Cube?! They have access to THOSE things?!)
All of a sudden, a red and black fog spread out and blanketed the whole river.
Our power grows while inside the Eternal Night's fog.
You, on the other hand, will suffer and languish due to its corrosion.
Your fates have been sealed. There is nowhere to run or hide.
Dammit... She's right. This fog is corroding our equipment and bodies!
Your Grace, we have to get out of the fog immediately!
Don't be hasty! All that's happening is the power generated by the Origin Cube is spreading out.
It's but a cheap trick. Do they think they can do as they please when I have God on my side?
We're near a district that has a Source of God's Light. There should be power stored there. Let us find out what it can do!
O God, I give my faith to you! Lend me your strength!
An indescribable power surged forth, and the dark fog instantly turned ashen in color before dissipating.
Wh-what? How is this possible?!
Hahah! It is possible to use the power of the Lattice of God's Light without even activating it!
(For being a Siren creation, that machine sure is straightforward in use...)
Did you think that was the end? It's only the beginning!
Marco Polo recited another prayer of sorts. The entire area was illuminated with golden light, the bodies of her and her aides glowing especially brightly.
This must be this world's image of Paradise... Magnificent! This will be good to reference!
Whoa... What is this? Is this brain power, too?!
I never imagined you would call upon the Lattice's power like this, Your Grace!
Ohohohoho! Save the praise for later! This is no time to talk!
Stronger have we grown! Now show them your might!
KABOOOM!
Hahaha! Feel the power of art!
Focus fire on one of them!
KABOOOM!
They're actually pushing us back...
It's hard to fully carry out an ambush decided on the spur of the moment.
Victory is out of our grasp... We should retreat, Trento.
You're right... I thought this was our chance to take her out, but alas...
Next time we meet, Marco Polo, we will attack you head-on.
Not so fast! I have a message for your boss!
Tsk... They sure ran away quickly!
Let's chase after them! They'll get away if we don't go now!
Your Grace, please be calm.
I AM calm. Why pursue them in the first place and risk walking into another trap of theirs?
Those parting words – "we will attack you head on"... They just did that!
No matter. The imperative now is to return to Rome and get a full grasp on the situation. Regroup and head out at full speed!

Third Step Into Night.say: Inside the fort's command center, the empress of the Eternal Night was organizing the latest intel.
The Banner of Eternal Night is deploying as planned. Night has already fallen on five of the member states, including the Dukedom of Milan.
As agreed, Milan will not mobilize, and the Genoan fleet is already on its way to Florence.
The Republic of Venice has split in two, and its march on the Ecclesia's territory has begun. It's but a matter of time before they raise the Banner.
We certainly got the jump on the Holy See. It's just a shame we couldn't kill Marco Polo.
The Apostle was born by a prophecy from God... We slightly underestimated her capabilities in battle.
Also, I'm concerned by that strange "power of disintegration" that Trento alluded to.
The Holy See may be steadily gaining control of more powerful divine weapons based on this "key."
We've confirmed that a divine army is sealed inside the Armory of God that was opened the other day. Their combat capabilities are unknown.
Which is to say, there's a good chance that we will grapple with more divine troops than we anticipated.
Share this information with Cavour and see what Milan thinks.
What matters more than anything else is that the Banner is raised.
If we can't completely convert the Lattice of God's Light into the Domain of Eternal Night, we can't get the power needed to engage the divine army on equal footing.
The power Marco Polo demonstrated may come to pose a threat to the Domain.
I entrust general command to you.
I'm going to head to the front line and launch the assault on Rome. I'll meet the Holy See in person.

Rite of the Final Judgment.say: Sardegna Ecclesia - Cathedral
Following Trento's and Bolzano's failed ambush, the group safely arrived back in Rome.
The moment they returned to the cathedral, they were swamped with report after report, more and more coming in every minute.
All nodes of up to tier three in the Two Sicilies, Venice, Genoa, and Milan have been lost.
All the while, Milan hasn't taken any sort of action.
Meanwhile, Florence is currently engaging a fleet from Genoa.
Florence's nodes have evaded capture thus far, but their tier one nodes aren't functioning as normal due to sabotage, while tier two and three nodes are struggling to run at full power.
At the same time, the first and second legation districts are being invaded by the Republic of Venice.
Currently, among the 10 legation districts in which nodes are housed, over half of all tier two and three nodes have been lost.
On the bright side, the tier one nodes in Bologna and Ancona remain under our control, as do the major tier two nodes in Ravenna.
The situation is the worst in the fourth legation district, where all tiers of nodes were lost in the Two Sicilies' first surprise attack. The College of Cardinals ordered a full withdrawal.
In the third legation district, it's not looking so good either. We're holding down the tier one nodes in Perugia, but losses exceed 40% among the tier two and three nodes.
As for the capital district, damages are minimal. The enemy hasn't as much as taken one step forward for fear of what's in the Armories of God.
For the moment, the most important top-tier nodes as well as the tier one through three nodes are all safe.
...How? How have they reduced us to this in so little time?!
Hang on... Something is missing from this report.
How are our troop casualties? And our equipment loss?
Those are still being counted. That being said, all the fighting is focused around places with a Source of God's Light. There is no damage to major naval facilities.
Administrative buildings don't seem to be the enemy's target either, so evacuating them was straightforward, and little damage was sustained.
Hmm... It's clear what they're after. The Lattice of God's Light.
According to our intel, they've been modifying rather than destroying the nodes across all regions following their capture.
They're apparently using some equipment known as "the Banner of the Eternal Night" to alter the Sources.

Now, this is just my conjecture, but it looks like the Banner draws from the same source of power as Andrea's faction does for METAmorphosis, and it's something they're using to counter the Lattice of God's Light.
This leads me to believe they're corroding and converting the Sources to take control of the Lattice for themselves.
(Corroding and converting... So METAmorphosis isn't solely a destructive force.)
(They seem quite adept at using it. I'll admit, it is quite fascinating...)
(Still, it's concerning how they want the Lattice for themselves... That thing might present a problem.)
(But wait... Andrea said something about "breaking free from God's cage," or whatever. So she means freeing themselves of the Sirens' control.)
(Why, then, won't they destroy the very thing that gives the Sirens control? Don't they know the risk?)
(Well, one thing is clear – my position will get worse and worse if I don't step in and do something!)
(If the Sirens wanted to meddle, fine, but did they have to get me involved? Ugh! What a pain!)
Your Grace, have you figured something out?
I'm just wondering – will the Lattice of God's Light be rendered unusable if all the captured nodes thus far were destroyed?
No, the situation isn't quite that dire.
Our technical division is currently carrying out emergency modifications so that the Lattice in the vicinity of Rome can be activated independently. The work should be done within two hours.
The core of the system converges around the outskirts of Rome, you see.

As long as Rome still stands, even if all other nodes are lost, the Lattice can still fully encase and protect the capital. By raising its output, it can even cover most of the Ecclesia's territory to some extent.
In other words, Rome will become their next target.
We won't let that happen. The Lattice's protective casing around Rome will be impenetrable so long as no nodes within its borders malfunction.
Furthermore, since all the nodes will be under Rome's protection, they will never be able to physically reach any nodes either. They would have to breach the barrier first.
Our enemies aren't stupid, mind you. They already planned this far ahead – they probably have a counter to this idea as well.
Wait... I've got it! I know why they're capturing the nodes rather than destroying them, despite their goal of "freeing themselves"!
I thought it was too absurd to be possible, but it seems I've misjudged them!
Trying to unshackle themselves from the Sirens... Friedrich's exact goal. Of course they're not stupid.
I... don't quite understand what you mean, Your Grace. Other than that you seem to hold Andrea in high regard.
Never mind that now! What matters is this: Andrea's goal is to take us down with her!
...With her, Your Grace?
They haven't captured all of these nodes so they can keep the Lattice of God's Light under their control forever.
She wants to pit the power she controls against ours and use that clash to ensure mutual destruction in the end!
The more nodes they convert, the higher the likelihood that her plan will succeed.
If it works, they can destroy the Lattice at minimal cost, and we'll be caught with our pants down without our defense.
Then are you saying that she's seizing the Lattice not to use it against us, but to make sure that it is destroyed?
Yes, clearly! She made it look as though she was slowly gaining control of it in order to throw us off.
She wanted us to think we were in for a protracted war and concentrate our troops in Rome so she could eliminate us in one fell swoop!
Clever, clever girl... If I wasn't familiar with the game she's playing, I would've totally fallen for it!
So, if she's coming to attack us... she'll most definitely do it from the sea!
...Then we must immediately relay this to the College of Cardinals and rethink our strategy.
Should we become reliant on the Lattice and unable to rebuild a defensive line, we should consider the Cardinals' proposal from a while back – to carry out the Rite of the Final Judgment.
Carry out the what now?
After a cursory look at some documents and having finished the necessary preparations, Marco Polo and Raffaello traversed a tunnel under the cathedral toward where the Rite was to be held.

The Rite of the Final Judgment – it was a ceremonial procedure that was discovered in the Armory of God that Marco Polo previously opened. The place where the Rite was to be held was discovered on the same day.
The Rite was to be performed by the Apostle alone, and Marco Polo was not to be accompanied by anyone.
Yet, for some reason, she decided to take advantage of the chaos and bring Raffaello with her.
After walking through the tunnel for some time, they arrived in a large room with an atmosphere much like that of the Armory of God.
The ceremony spot is just up ahead. Just walk up to that control panel in the middle of the hall. All I gotta do is stand by, right?
Yes. Just wait over here. I'll go have a look.
Marco Polo walked up to the hall's center and gazed up at the massive sculpture before her that radiated a holy light.
A bit over the top if you ask me, but...
Gazing back down, she saw what clearly looked to be a Siren-made control device, blue patterns sticking out from its black, metallic surface.
Typical Siren design.
For the Rite of the Final Judgment, the chosen shipgirl Apostle would first interface directly with the doomsday device left by God and overcome the trials it presented.
Should she emerge triumphant, the doomsday device would awaken the divine armies resting all across the archipelago and smite all of the Ecclesia's foes, letting God's light shine forever.
Alright. Let's see what this thing wants me to do.
The instant that she put her hands on the doomsday device, her surroundings changed completely.

sequence: "On the first day, the army of nonbelievers approached."
"On the second day, Rome was engulfed in flames."
"On the third day, Sardegnia was engulfed by the long dark."
"On the fourth day, the divine army finally awoke."
"On the fifth day, the Domain of Eternal Night collapsed."
"On the sixth day, the judgment of Paradise Lost came a second time."
"On the seventh day, God's light shone forever upon the world."

Rite of the Final Judgment.say: A while later, Marco Polo regained consciousness.
..."On the seventh day, God's light shone forever upon the world."
I get it. This is the synopsis of the tale the Sirens wrote. Andrea was completely right.
They want to free themselves, so they were going to plunge the Holy See into crisis, leaving me with no option but to assist them in achieving their goals...
Unfortunately for them, I'm not going to fall for that. I have no interest in the Sirens' plays.
I mustn't allow the power gathered through the Rite to go to waste...
If we're to awaken something to place our faith and hopes in, let it not be the Sirens, but rather what I myself believe in!
With a plan in mind, Marco Polo returned to Raffaello.
Well? Think the ritual will go well?
Of course, but I have an even better plan.
Even better? Sounds like there's a reason why you brought me along.
First of all, do you think that story circulated by Andrea's faction is true or false?
Uhh... I'm just a painter. What would I know about that?
Alright, then let's suppose Andrea came to you with money and a commission. Would you draw for her or not?
I would, obviously. I've done stuff like that before.
And what if I was the one paying?
Then that's even more reason to draw. What do you have in mind?
Magnificent. So, my commission is as follows...
After Marco Polo had given Raffaello as much detail as she could possibly muster and even a few diagrams she made herself, Raffaello finally understood what to draw.
Are you sure you want me to draw this? It's beyond eccentric – it borders on the unsettling.
Is this really your image of God? Never heard anyone pin an appearance like this to 'em...
Also, do you even need this for the Rite?
I am the Apostle, am I not?
Well, yeah.
And who would know better about God and rituals than the Apostle herself?
Nobody. 'Cause you're the Apostle.
There you go, you dolt. Fine, what if I double your remuneration?
Well, the customer is always right! Your bidding is my command, Your Grace!
Magnificent! O God, behold the grand stage which I shall offer to thee!

Gate V-VI.say: The sound of the chorus had faded, but the pure-white world stretched on infinitely.
There was no more concept of "inside" or "outside" the doors, and distance became meaningless. Even time and space gradually lost meaning.
Finally, among the infinite whiteness, a single figure appeared.
Weird... Why is it so quiet here?
I had to fight through violent tides the whole way over.
Wait... Am I sensing something invisible?
Begin inspection. Reveal the truth of this place to me!
A figure took form for an instant, but it disappeared once more.
Goodness, such a high level...
Hold it, I recognize you. Antiochus?
Are you the one who calmed this place so much?
I see... You've advanced in level, but you're still trapped here?
Mine is too low to help you... but I do have an idea to help you.
Release me, and I will help you descend!
It was then that another figure appeared.
The situation is as dire as they come, but I'm helpless to act...
O God, thy power must be mine.
I know... that you want to descend upon this world.
I'll use your power to create the Kingdom of God... The beginning of a blissful, eternal age of glory for all of mankind, free of danger.
(Marco Polo? Are these her memories from before the false god's arrival?)
I reach out my hand and touch the soliloquizing figure, but when I do, all turns to endless white again.
This makes me realize that I'm still in the gate.
The chorus begins anew.
OL PZ YLHKF AV JVUCLYZL
"He is ready to converse."
IL AOLPY CVPJLZ VUL VY THUF
"Be their voices one or many..."
VUSF LJOVLZ YLTHPU PU AOL LUK
"Only echoes remain in the end."

A Bold Plan.say: After five rounds of revision, Marco Polo finally found herself satisfied.
Hmm... Not bad! Great painter, indeed – your rendition is nothing short of beautiful!
I'm glad you're happy, Your Grace!
At least you didn't tell me to undo all of the revisions in the end...
Anyway! Now that the painting is done, what do you want to do?
Heheh... I plan to modify the Rite of the Final Judgment to yield new results!
Not to awaken these so-called divine armies, but to herald the appearance of the one true God!
What is that look in your eye? Do you think the Apostle Marco Polo would fail?
No, no! I know that nobody knows God better than you, Your Grace!
But to be honest... the God in this painting is strange. Like, really weird.
Do you find it any stranger than divine weapons and armies?
I won't hide the truth from you. Andrea's talk of stories and cages? It's all true.
I saw the script of said story with my own two eyes.
If I carry out the rite as written, Paradise Lost will befall this world once more.
The divine weapons will return, an Apostle will hold all the power, and the world will be forever ruled by God's hands.
Your God has another name: The Sirens.
This very world is but another of their twisted test sites.
Here they test faith, and you – and everyone else born here – are their guinea pigs.
"Cage" is an apt descriptor for this world, really.
The world is a cage...?
Please. You must have had some inkling of it.
Da Vinci realized it, too. Otherwise, you two wouldn't use "brain power" to describe the so-called power of faith. To be quite honest, I happen to like that phrase.
Ahahaha... Nothing gets past you, Your Grace.
I do generally support Andrea's idea of reforming faith and the Church.
But I didn't think she would be so radical, let alone that she'd start a war over it!
She panicked when she learned of my appearance, because she thought I would mobilize the divine army.
Yet nobody ever stopped to question whether I wanted to fight in the first place!
Umm... DO you want to fight, Your Grace?
Absolutely not!
Hell, if she'd come and TALKED to me, I would've joined her!
Better we fight our common enemy together than squabble among ourselves!
...The Apostle herself would rebel against the Holy See?
It's called righting the course.
But our factions are already fighting. There's nothing we can do now, is there?
There's still time! We may have lost the nodes of the Lattice of God's Light, but fortunately, there has been little loss of actual life.
Our army can still act. It's the perfect time for a bit of deceit!
Heheh, I might've failed last time, but I am the kind of woman who knows how to learn from mistakes!
God's given me a second chance.
And damn it, I'll do it right this time!
Did you say "last time"?
It's a long story. I'll tell you another time.
Okay, what about the whole deceit thing? What are we doing?
I have a plan, but the two of us can't accomplish it alone.
Then let's get Carducci and the others involved! They won't say it out loud, but I know how they feel, so don't worry!
Well, well, what a coincidence. I was just thinking the same thing.
Go back to them and tell them there was an issue with the Rite. Have them come to me.
And then...

Showdown Between Light and Dark?.say: A while later, Marco Polo and Raffaello returned after their secret talk at the ritual grounds and reorganized their forces.
They were going to withdraw their troops and allow Andrea's faction to capture every node of the Lattice of God's Light.
At the same time, their whole army would converge upon Rome and make it appear as though they were conducting a massive ritual to buy themselves time out of desperation.
Sure enough, Andrea Doria took notice and launched a naval attack with the brunt of her force, just as Marco Polo predicted.
We meet again, Raffaello. I'm quite surprised to see that you're leading the Ecclesia's navy.
Where is your leader – Marco Polo?
Her Grace is, well, busy, so she kinda just threw her arms up and told me to take care of the trouble here.
"Threw her arms up," you say? She must have put a lot of faith into this ritual of hers. No pun intended.
And yet, she has surrendered so many nodes to buy herself some time.
It frankly doesn't seem like the smartest idea, does it?
Maybe, maybe not. I'll let you enjoy the suspense.
Andrea, I'm starting to think Raffaello is also stalling for time.
Yes, and I've said my piece. All there is to do now is attack head-on.
Fine by me. I'll be coming at you as straight as spaghetti!
Da Vinci, Alfredo, remember the plan!
Do everything you can to hold the others back while I go and persuade Andrea!
KABOOOM!
Using the power granted by the Lattice of God's Light, Raffaello cut the distance to Andrea in the blink of an eye.
Andrea, meanwhile, began to brandish the power of the Domain of Eternal Night. Instantly, the world was split between light and dark.
Raffaello, you have walked into a trap.
Stall for time if you so wish, but have you thought about why I'm not doing the same?
Do you think Rome is untouchable as long as you have the Lattice of God's Light?
Nah. The thing is, Marco Polo knows you want to take us down with you, which'll result in the Lattice's destruction.
"Take you down with me"... An interesting way to phrase it. If you've seen through my plan, why deploy your forces like this, then?
Is that ritual of hers really worth staking everything on?
I wouldn't say the ritual is that important – it's you who's the most important.
The reason I'm here is to talk to you, plain and simple.
What is there to talk about after we've come this far? You're not thinking about switching sides, are you?
Uh, no. Speaking in terms of composition, we're the champions of light and you're the warriors of darkness.
...But out of curiosity, if you wanted me to join the dark side, what kind of deal would you offer me?
How about double whatever the Ecclesia is paying you?
Ooh, an enticing offer! But I'll have to say no thanks. Tell me the truth about the world, will you?
Everything I've said is the truth.
The "God" the Holy See has worshipped for all this time is a bunch of ancient machines. Robots, in essence.
They made up a religion and used the Holy See to manipulate the world based on that false belief. All as the pretense – the story – for their experiments.
Their relics, not least of all the Lattice that you're using right now, pose a disastrous threat to the world.
The relics exist for one purpose – to turn us all into puppets who dance at their command in the name of faith.
Do you even know what the ending is to this story that they've come up with?
Even if you beat us into submission and do exactly what they want you to, all that awaits you in the end is death and devastation.
It's called a "reset," and it wipes out both their most loyal followers and their most staunch opponents.
I mean, I think I've basically conformed to the status quo, but that doesn't mean I really believed in God.
That's why I approve of the revolution you've been working toward.
I just didn't expect that you'd do it by dragging your allies into an all-out war.
I'm trying to keep casualties on both sides to a minimum. You already know that, don't you?
"Minimum" doesn't mean "none."
Besides, think about it. You didn't go to war because of the threat of the Rite of the Final Judgment – you did it because the Lattice was going to be activated.
Sure, it'll lead to the world's downfall one day if left unchecked, but you don't know whether that one day will be tomorrow or a thousand years from now.
Don't get me wrong, I'm not saying that what you're doing here is wrong.
But, if you know the Sirens are manipulating us all, have you not considered that this war may be just another part of their story?
You jumped the gun a little bit, and, well... here we are.
I was out of time. A shipgirl Apostle had been born, and the Holy See had the key to activate those divine weapons.
I know what's resting inside of the 9th Armory of God. Other places like it exist across the Ecclesia, and only – and I mean ONLY – the Apostle can control the divine army once awakened.
With that kind of power, nobody would be able to challenge the Holy See, and as the executioners of "God's" experiments, they would put unbreakable shackles on all of us.
But that hasn't happened yet. The cage hasn't been locked shut just yet. That was why I had to act.
This was my one and only hope.
Okay, so you're mostly on the right track, but you're forgetting about one crucial thing.
One crucial thing?
Yeah. What if – seriously, what if – Marco Polo already knew all of this?
And what if she not only knew more than you, but she was trying to do the same thing as you – to destroy the cage around us?
It's like I said earlier. I just came here to talk to you.
I'll be real with you – Marco Polo has come up with an unbelievable plan to fix everything.
We'll both get what we want if you help her with it.
Interested? Then hear me out for a bit.
Sometime earlier, at the Rite of the Final Judgment's ritual grounds...
Marco Polo gathered her aides under the pretense of a problem with the Rite, then proceeded to tell them the same thing as she told Raffaello just earlier.
As Raffaello anticipated, they readily offered to cooperate with her.
It was then that Marco Polo began to detail her plan.
Let me make this clear: I know what I'm doing, and you are all to follow my instructions!
Our forces have already been concentrated in Rome. Andrea is similarly amassing her own forces.
What God expects to happen next is an all-out war between the two of us.
However, I will not be playing into His hand!
We are going to broach discussions with Andrea in secret. We give the impression that we're fighting while actually working together.
Then, under God's watch, we will focus our forces in one place in a way He will never see coming.
Then the plan begins in earnest. We will activate the divine army and use our might to destroy each and every one of God's weapons.
Both sides will join forces, and after our armies have arrived, we will modify the Rite and make it so God's weapons can no longer be strengthened by the power of faith.
And not just that – we'll issue self-destruct orders, switch off defense systems, and give contradicting orders. Anything we can to put them in utter disarray.
When the divine army is at its weakest, we will all march on Rome and wipe it out!
Once that cursed army is completely annihilated, the world will be free from its cage.
I will remain as the Apostle and the Ecclesia's army will follow the Holy See's commands. My commands, in other words.
And we'll all live happily ever after. The end!
Oh, and don't worry, the army won't question my orders. They'll believe me if I say they came to me in a revelation in this place.
Wow... They'll buy it, just like that?
This is certainly an... unexpected plan.
Sounds risky. Just the way I like it!
Right? Now, for the concrete details of this plan...
Raffaello explained Marco Polo's plan from start to finish, and Andrea was dumbfounded from sheer surprise.
So yeah, that's more or less the idea.
Marco Polo sure is a woman of... unconventional brilliance.
I hate to admit it, but it's a very appealing plan.
I still cannot trust her, though. You must understand – at the end of the day, she serves "God." She is the chosen one who was born in the Shipyard of God.
So you want proof of her rebellion, huh? Don't worry, as we speak, she is taking faith in God and turning it into faith in her.
Once that's done, you'll know exactly where she stands!
Faith in... her? How in the world will she do that?
The power to come up with things is in the heart of each and every one of us.
Anyway, let's separate a bit and keep up the appearance that we're in a standoff! Then just sit back and watch as her masterful plan unfolds!
Alright. From there, I will determine her true worth.

The Silent Statue.say: There, amidst the complete whiteness extending endlessly in all directions, I arrive before... it.
You. You're the one who's been showing me those things, aren't you?
No response. Hierophant just stands there in the distance, silent like an incomplete statue.
I've seen everything you showed.
Am I right to assume that you're stuck in this place?
And you've been wanting to escape. It's why you teamed up with the META Hatakaze and tried to create a "Kingdom of God" for Marco Polo.
You might not harbor any ill will, but most of your actions have had consequences beyond your expectations – beyond your control, even.
Although the statue still does not say a word, for a moment, it looks like there's a glimmer in its gemstone-like eyes.
I'm sure what's happening to Marco Polo now also has something to do with you.
What have you done to her?
The calm whiteness starts to shiver, like a rising tide is pressing in on all sides.
The very next moment, the soundless waves come flooding in.
Everything except the waves rapidly dissolves like ice, eventually leaving nothing but a void.
Then, from the gaps between the snow-white waves, Marco Polo's figure comes into view.
"O God, I give you all my faith."
V NVK, P NPCL FVB HSS TF MHPAO
The voice of the chorus reverberates, and the white waves once more cover the void.
"I am with you, and you are with me."
P HT DPAO FVB, HUK FVB HYL DPAO TL
Again, the chorus rings out, and a figure becomes visible... it.
"Please, grant me the strength to repel the Sirens once more."
WSLHZL, NYHUA TL AOL ZAYLUNAO AV YLWLS AOL ZPYLUZ VUJL TVYL
With one more utterance from the chorus, a colossal weapon known as a Gazer reveals itself.
Then, another white wave washes in, replacing everything with a blank nothingness.
The endless expanse of white regains its calm, and the statue is still silent.
Even so, in the jewels of its eyes, I can clearly make out Marco Polo's figure.
It seems that she and Hierophant have forged a deep bond.
Having seen all these things, I have a plethora of questions to ask, but I don't even know where to start.
She is using your power to fight the Sirens.
How do you... feel about that?
The statue says nothing in response.

Unforeseen Development.say: Marco Polo's ritual of faith conversion had clear and immediate effects.
A power of faith hitherto unknown to this world surged forth from Rome, transmitting along the Lattice of God's Light.
A familiar yet strangely foreign air condensed in the skies of the Apennine Archipelago, signaling to the world the birth of a new being.
Looks like her ritual's complete! See? No divine army to be seen and you're all still alive.
Most telling of all is this surge of brain power. It does not lie.
So? Do you believe me now?
Marco Polo... You're piquing my curiosity more by the minute.
She actually altered the ritual "God" left behind... and she used it to create a new type of faith?
I don't know all the nitty-gritty, but it sure looks that way.
She said the faith is now for a real God – one who can help us take down anyone or anything that's out for us.
It looks... extremely suspicious.
Yeah. I'm the one who had to draw it up, so I'd know!
Still, she IS the Apostle, so if anyone knows how to use faith for good, it's her.
Are you saying you believe in that "God"?
I wouldn't say I believe in it, but I don't disbelieve in it either.
Oh, I got a message from Marco Polo. She says she wants to talk to you.
Very well.
Thus, Marco Polo and Andrea initiated a conversation over the phone.
Since Andrea was up to speed, the conversation went extremely smoothly.
Both sides laid out and agreed to a truce, then they swiftly began to formulate their next plan.
But, just as everything was going swimmingly...
BEEP BEEP!
Andrea, the divine army launched an attack on us out of nowhere!
What? The divine army?!
Yes. They're attacking Venice, Genoa, and Milan all at the same time. We must mount a response posthaste.
But why? Why are they attacking?
Huh? Don't look at me! I have no idea!
Come again? The divine army is staging an attack?!
I can tell you right now, I have eyes on the 9th Armory of God, and nothing has happened there.
In other words, I had nothing to do with this!
Okay... So it wasn't you, then.
Then the attackers must've been divine armies that lay dormant across the League. Ones so well hidden, even we weren't aware of them.
I suspect that "God" sensed a threat and forcibly commenced the Rite of the Final Judgment.
Hmph. If He thinks He can try, let Him! The power I command now should strike fear in the heart of even God!
You know what? I'm going to stop calling these wretches "God." I don't want any confusion between them and my God.
Let's just agree to call them Sirens, alright?
Sirens? Okay, and what does "God" mean to you, then?
God, simply! What else? I'm renaming them Sirens now to avoid confusion, so if you want me to redefine "God," that defeats the whole point!
Ahem... That aside, we can't put the divine army genie back in the bottle now, but the Siren weapons in and around Rome are still under our control.
Curse those Sirens and their schemes... I thought I'd caught them unawares!
Instead, they strike just as we joined forces and were about to hit them where it hurts! This isn't what was supposed to happen!
They built this cage over a thousand years. Of course escaping it won't be easy.
We still have a chance, though. Before anything else, we should group up and relocate our headquarters.
There is no better time than now to knock out the Sirens surrounding Rome.
Heheh, my thoughts exactly. Let's deal with what's on the table first!

Gate VII.say: The statue in the endless white expanse is as silent as ever, but the sights reflected in its eyes are changing every moment.
Is that... Marco Polo? Are these more memories?
No, not quite. It feels like it's happening in the present... like it's unfolding right now.
They were performing some strange ritual, then redeploying their forces...
So while her body is sound asleep, her mind is off on these unbelievable escapades?
There is nothing but silence from the statue.
Well, from what I can tell, you're trapped somewhere for some reason.
What I'm seeing here is just a projection that I can recognize.
You can probably see me to some extent just as I can see you, but who knows how much information is being relayed to you.
Am I supposed to make a clear and definite wish to you if I want you to answer any of my questions?
Marco Polo did that once, so...
There is nothing but silence from the statue.
(I'll give it a try. It can't hurt.)
Hierophant, please show me any information pertaining to Marco Polo's location.
I make a wish to the statue.
Not long after, another door appears.
I reach out to touch it, and everything changes abruptly.
Deployment of experiment mechanism proceeding smoothly. Installation of mainframe proceeding normally.
Core experiment – generation and application of conceptualization – has been established.
Commencing intervention of belief system.
Formulation of belief system has been completed. Moving to second phase of ideological guidance.
Detecting effects of conceptualization. Generation mechanism is a point of uncertainty.
Initiating introduction of meteorite sample to test site.
Wisdom Cube experiments postponed until further notice. Launch will commence following start of third phase of ideological guidance.
Basic replication of conceptual effect has been successful. Generation mechanism remains uncertain.
Preparing to initiate third phase of ideological guidance.
Implementing introduction of Wisdom Cubes to test site.
Task allotments for Tester, Purifier, and Compiler systems complete.
Mission codename: "Paradise Lost."
Stable replication of conceptual effect has been successful. Generation mechanism continues to elude understanding.
Instability of mind due to singular ideology has been detected.
Stable amplification of conceptual effect due to meteorite sample has been detected.
Observations verify that, under specific circumstances, the amplified conceptual effect provided by the meteorite sample can affect the structure of Wisdom Cubes.
Initiating introduction of Origin Cubes to test site.
Preparing to initiate fourth phase of ideological guidance.
Observations verify that thoughts stemming from faith can present two polarizing properties.
Initiating amplification experiment.
Observations verify that pure samples can amplify the assimilation property of the meteorite sample in the form of thought transmission.
Initiating amplification experiment.
Observations verify that pure samples can amplify the corrosion property of origin Cubes in the form of thought transmission.
Initiating amplification experiment.
Observations verify the existence of a neutralization phenomenon between polar opposite samples.
Initiating amplification experiment.
Warning: Rate of control loss in pure samples has reached 30%.
Warning: Rate of control loss in pure samples has reached 50%.
Warning: Rate of control loss in pure samples has reached 70%.
Devising plans to shut down Conceptual Neutralization Experiment Laboratory.
Warning: Rate of control loss in pure samples has reached 90%.
Devising plans to shut down Conceptual and META Bidirectional Interference Experiment Laboratory.
Preparing to initiate local purification program.
Emergency orders received. Halting local purification program.
Initiating control transfer of test site ES-131618 (7.728, 55.597, 17.334, -62167144220).
Recipient: Arbiter System – Arbiter: The Hierophant V.
As it has this whole time, the statue maintains its silence.
While some of my questions were answered, this also created a whole slew of new ones.
Test site ES-131618... The one you took charge of, Hierophant.
Are you able to oversee it, even in the state you're in now?
Did you bring Marco Polo there in order to get help from her or something?
If so, did you bring me here for the same reason? Because you need my help?
Silence. The statue offers no answers, and my voice echoes hollowly in this horizonless stretch of white nothingness.

Two-Way Interference.say: Sardegna Ecclesia - Capital
Thanks to your orders, Your Grace, the Sirens' army is in complete chaos.
The Ecclesia's efforts to exterminate them is proceeding extremely smoothly.
Ohohoho! Of course it is! Now, any news on Andrea? Has she managed to relocate her command center?
Yes, that is done.
As you've ordered, she has also been lent Florence's Sources of God's Light in order to maintain the Domain of Eternal Night.
It's going very well on her end, thanks to the... many strings they pulled to gain the upper hand in the war.
That worked to our benefit as well, so it's fine. And since we're on the same page, any advantage she can spare for us will make our job easier.
How are things on the other fronts?
The Sirens' armies are conducting a fierce attack. Three of them have breached nearby states' territory and are heading for Rome.
Well, well, they're clearly after me.
How magnificent! If they're split in three, that makes it easier to pick off one at a time.
Now, the Lattice of God's Light has many nodes, so how does the network connecting these nodes function?
I believe it was called the microlayer transference system...
At least, that's what I got out of Veneto back then...
Ah, I've got it! We'll use the transference system to strike where the enemy least expects it!
Micro-what now? What did you say?
The portal-like thing that lets you quickly move to where a node is located.
Uhh... Giosuè, does the Lattice have a function like that?
If it does, I've certainly never heard of it before.
What? You haven't?!
Meanwhile, in the boundless land of white...
Through the eyes of the stone statue, I've grasped what's happening in Marco Polo's World.
During the near-superimposition event, Clemenceau took Compiler's microlayer transference system and modified it. It wasn't part of her original plan.
But wait... When Richelieu had the system activated, Marco Polo had already been thrown into the sea. How and when did Marco learn about it from Veneto?
She never even told me about it. Maybe it was when Shinano brought Veneto into Marco's dream.
...She really knows how to exploit every opportunity she gets.
And the way she manifested a weapon with the power of thought, just like at the World Expo...
Then there are those airships. Da Vinci made good use of those once.
At any rate, let's see what Marco's next move is.
Inside a desolate world overrun with thorns, religious thoughts collided with one another in the air.
What's this? I was in the headquarters a moment ago! Where am I?
Eagles? And... a fleet of airships?
Hold on a moment – is this a memory from the opening ceremony of the World Expo?
Ahh, I see now... This must be a revelation from God.
Yes, indeed... The power of faith passes through the Lattice of God's Light and accumulates here!
An airship fleet... I like the sound of that.
But, if we're going to use the imagery of Rome, it's best to do so in Florence. I'll have da Vinci handle that.
Now, if one were to try to materialize concepts relating to God...
Four horses in the colors white, red, black, and green crossed Marco Polo's mind.
I have to admit, that woman has decent taste...
Mechanicus Harbingers, you will be my pick!

Gate VIII-X.say: With the power of conception in her hand, Marco Polo materialized the Mechanicus Harbingers, familiar sights from both the World Expo and the Kerguelen Islands.
At the same time, she ordered Raffaello to travel to Florence and manifest a fleet of airships.
It's a start... but it's not enough.
If I can use the Sources of God's Light to replicate God's Kingdom and bring Him to us, then maybe...
Meanwhile, in the boundless land of white...
Huh? What the hell is this?
Marco Polo suddenly issued a series of orders that were identical to what I came up with just a moment ago.
I'm going to assume she didn't develop and master telepathy all of a sudden...
That leaves just one option. Hierophant, are you relaying my thoughts to her?
That's why she began manifesting all those weapons and got ready for you to descend to earth. Right?
Was this your goal all along?
Was it all to replicate the conditions of the near-superimposition event in a new test site so she could herald your arrival?
There is nothing but silence from the statue.
No... If that was your goal, there would've been no need to involve me.
Then you must have some other motive...
Whatever that may be, I know one thing for sure: That ritual is far too dangerous.
Even with the limitations of a Mirror Sea during your first attempt, the superimposition almost came to be. There would've been no turning back then.
How are you going to finish it this time?
Tell me, Hierophant. I want to know your plans.
I ask the statue for answers.
Not long after, another door appears.
I reach out to touch it, and everything changes abruptly.
I wish you would've delayed the shutdown just a little, Lady Hierophant. The protocol would've wiped Sardegnia Island completely clean by now.
Now I must go to great lengths to hide it for you.
I'm aware that you know nothing about this task. That's why I restored the META research facilities for you.
Is there anything else I can do?
...I only asked out of politeness. You weren't supposed to actually ask for more help.
...I have to repair ALL of it? Are you pulling my leg?
...You can't do it by yourself?
I knew you were inept, but not to THIS extent.
Have you no pride as a self-improving AI weapon?
...You are so, so lucky that I promised I would assist.
If you have trouble in the future, save it for Devil. I'm done working with you.
...I can understand the Ruins of God. Same with the Armories of God – but what in the world is the "Shipyard of God" and "Garden of God"?
You know what? Forget I asked. This is what I get for having an interest in someone's experiments.
The Wisdom Cubes will be distributed as "gifts from God," as you asked.
Let's hope the final result of your experiment will be... interesting. Heheheh.
As it has this whole time, the statue maintains its silence.
(I feel like I just got a glimpse of a side of Hierophant that few ever get.)
(Chariot, huh? Another Arbiter whose image I should commit to memory.)
Another door appears.
The sky and sea change so dramatically once you pierce the Veil...
The rumors were true, Cesare. Sardegnia Island wasn't obliterated – it was just hidden by God!
What a hideous sight... It's as though a war took place here.
Andrea, I've sighted a cluster of remarkably intact buildings. There's some writing that I can't read. Mind taking a look?
Sure. Let me see.
It says... "Conceptual and META Bidirectional Interference Experiment Laboratory"?
A laboratory? In this place?
Hey, is it just me... or have you also not been able to sense the power of faith since we came in here? It should be able to be felt from anywhere.
Yes, now that you mention it...
There must be earthshaking secrets lying in this hidden battleground...
We have to scour this place thoroughly!
As it has this whole time, the statue maintains its silence.
...That's why test site ES-13161 is home to so many METAs.
They took advantage of the Sirens' abandoned facilities and willingly underwent METAmorphosis.
So there exists technology that can induce controlled METAmorphosis... Assuming it really can be controlled, that is.
Another door appears.
Restructuring of the security system is complete.
I have also created 255 sub-options to meet the various needs of your experiments.
The buttons for options 1 through 255 are all here. Don't touch anything besides these.
Also refrain from touching buttons 251 through 255. They initiate emergency backup plans I set up for you.
Finally, I've positioned one of my own MECHArbitrators here.
Don't say anything about it not being enough. One MECHArbitrator can endure more punishment than a combined fleet can dish out in over a thousand years.
I'm going to be busy for a few days now while I write a manual for you. When that's done, I'm not coming back here ever again.
While I'd love to see the experiment's results, I'm not going to sit around for centuries waiting for them.
Let me know when the results are in.
As it has this whole time, the statue maintains its silence.
I wait for a minute or two, but no other doors appear.
What I gathered from that is that Chariot constructed the defense system of test site ES-131618 and only you can control it.
But, since you're in your... current state, the defense system is working automatically.
The fiercest part of the system is a MECHArbiter, and apparently, it would be impossible to take down even if the whole test site worked together.
Therefore, the one and only way they could survive was if you used Marco Polo to bring you down to earth, right?
Did you nudge her in the direction of the Sardegnia Island Mirror Sea in order to minimize potential collateral damage caused by the ritual?
Seeing as it's under the control of Andrea's side, they should be able to keep collateral fairly low.
Now I understand everything that's happened so far. Marco Polo and that world face a potential apocalypse.
I'm not sure how well Marco Polo will be able to control the collateral of the ritual, either...
You still have yet to tell me – what exactly do you want my help with?
Is there anything that isn't going exactly how you planned it?
Silence. The statue offers no answers, and my voice echoes hollowly in this horizonless stretch of white nothingness.

Baiting the Enemy.say: Sardegna Ecclesia·Capital
After witnessing the same series of visions as the Commander did, Marco Polo fell into deep thought.
(If those visions are true... that means Sardegnia Island was not destroyed by Paradise Lost, merely concealed by a Mirror Sea.)
(Andrea has long known this secret, and she captured the island and that META research laboratory in secret.)
(The cornerstone of this branch's security system is a massive mech known as MECHArbiter: The Chariot.)
(Hmm... So did God just give me a divine revelation to use the light of Heaven to get rid of that steel beast?)
She went through the bits of information in her head, then reached a conclusion.
(The revelation is clear. That being the case, I should stick to the plan.)
(Said plan being divided into two steps: Luring out the enemy, then annihilating it.)
(The latter isn't that much of a problem. However powerful it is, it should be fine as long as I can fully materialize the Kingdom of God and throw an army of Gazers at it.)
(So luring it out will be the tricky part. This MECHArbiter hasn't as much as shown a glimpse of itself yet!)
(The Sirens are still preserving their forces... I need to make them escalate.)
(We could use my Kingdom of God ritual as bait, but setting it up will take time, and forget about catching them by surprise if we're too conspicuous...)
(What else is there? Ah, right, Raffaello is good at these things. I'll ask her.)
BEEP!
Hmm... A way to make the Sirens escalate...
How about making it look like we're gonna blow Rome to bits?
Like, what if we took that mutual destruction plan Andrea had and turned it up to eleven?
The Sirens want you and the METAs to be at each other's throats, right? It's their goal, methinks.
So what if it seemed like the METAs were about to destroy the capital before that goal was achieved?
A magnificent idea! That's ideal for Andrea to transfer the core node of the Domain of Eternal Night to Sardegnia Island.
Not only will it draw out the enemy, but also it will make them turn their their sights to that island. A textbook example of baiting the enemy!
Andrea at once to– No, focus on manifesting the Mechanicus Harbingers! I will personally go and speak to Andrea.
Once the MECHArbiter is defeated, all that will remain are disordered small fry!
Ohohoho! What an ingenious plan!

Gate XI.say: I watched through the statue's eyes as Marco Polo traveled to Sardegnia Island in a great hurry.
So that's what you were planning...
Judging by her reaction, though, she didn't see records as they were – rather, you showed her doctored visions, didn't you?
While the statue remains silent, I feel like it's silently confirming my suspicions. If Marco Polo had seen the same things as I, she wouldn't have reacted to Hierophant.
Let me guess. You aren't presenting yourself to her as "God" on purpose, but the time to clear up that misunderstanding has passed, and now you're simply going along with it – right?
That amusing possibility crosses my mind.
Somehow, I get the feeling that the statue averted its gaze for but a moment.
...Can Marco Polo really deal with the MECHArbiter with the information you've given her?
Chariot said something about her MECHArbiter having the strength to rival the entire test site all at once, didn't she?
Although a statue cannot express emotions, it feels like it just looked away anxiously.
I'm starting to figure out why you dragged me into this.
Marco Polo and her subjects wield the collective power of the mind, while Andrea and her supporters have the corrosive might of METAmorphosis on their side.
"Bring the other down with them." "Neutralization phenomenon between polar opposites." The powers you gave them will be the key to victory against your army in this world.
In the branch I come from, we did something similar for dealing with the protective barriers of Tester, Purifier, and Omitter.
